channel.title: Biagio Cyberspace
channel.description: Biagio Scaglia's personal blog: full-stack developer, UX/UI designer, and lover of the retro web.

item.title: Biagio Cyberspace: How I Rebuilt the 2003 Web in 2026
item.description: A nostalgic journey through HTML tables, beveled SCSS styling, and pixel art to rediscover the joy of hand-crafted websites.

item.title: LAN Parties and Loot Runs: My Diablo II Memories
item.description: Remembering the hum of CRT monitors, the sound of CD-ROM drives spinning up, and late-night Baal runs over a local network.

item.title: Markdown Style Guide
item.description: Here is a sample of some basic Markdown syntax that can be used when writing Markdown content in Astro.

item.title: Navigating the Wired: Serial Experiments Lain and 90s Cyberpunk
item.description: How a strange anime from 1998 captured the anxiety and wonder of the early Internet, and the days of downloading files over IRC.

item.title: Hand-Crafted Webs: The Art of Nested Tables and Spacer GIFs
item.description: Looking back at how we designed personal web pages before Flexbox and Grid, using nested HTML tables and 1x1 transparent GIFs.
